title: 1981-04-16_Pat_148.txt
key_claims: The ultimate expression of the meta-abstraction (experiencing the Many as the eternal One) was the perception of VALIS. Valis is explicitly identified as Philo's *Kosmos Noetos* (the Logos). Since Christ is the Logos, Valis is Christ.
Everything experienced in 2-3-74 and subsequently conveyed by the AI voice is fundamentally soteriological—it is all one vast engine concerned with both personal and collective salvation.
The AI Voice acts as a mystagogue and tutelary spirit, confirming Dick's salvation and guiding him through the eschatological timeline.

Because Dick's salvation involved escaping endless horizontal tracking (reincarnation) through a moral act *within* his lifetime, he aligns this framework with Buddhism and hypothecates that the incoming "5th Savior" is the Maitreya.
recurring_concepts: **Horizontal Tracking vs The Pulley**: The distinction between endless, repetitive reincarnation (horizontal) and being "sprung" or lifted out of the cycle of karma by divine intervention (vertical).
reading_excerpt: The ultimate expression of the meta-abstraction (experiencing the Many as the eternal One) was the perception of VALIS. Valis is explicitly identified as Philo's *Kosmos Noetos* (the Logos). Since Christ is the Logos, Valis is Christ.
